title: dontospermum mogadorense
intro: Dontospermum mogadorense, also known as Mogadorense or Khat plant, is a flowering plant native to the Horn of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its stimulant and anxiolytic effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as cathinone and cathine. The health benefits of Dontospermum mogadorense include reducing fatigue, improving mental alertness, and providing relief from mild depression and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Dontospermum mogadorense typically involve drying the leaves and infusing them in hot water to create a tea or brewing them into a traditional coffee substitute.
